Public transport is readily available within 1 km, making daily commutes seamless. For those relying on rail transport, Lingampally Railway Station is just 4 km away, while HITEC City Metro Station is only 5 km away, providing excellent connectivity to major city hubs.::

resultList.dtldesc: A well-designed 3 BHK flat in Jains Carlton Creek Phase II offers modern living in one of Hyderabads most sought-after neighborhoods. With spacious interiors, premium amenities, and excellent connectivity to IT hubs, schools, and shopping centers, this home ensures both comfort and convenience.Property SpecificationsThis well-planned flat on the 3rd floor of a 13-story building offers ample fresh air and natural sunlight, creating a bright and inviting living space. Thoughtfully designed interiors ensure comfort, while modern fittings enhance functionality.The layout includes two bedrooms, a spacious hall, a dining area, and a well-equipped kitchen. The master bedroom features a 6x6 cot integrated into the wardrobe deck, while the kids bedroom comes with a study table and wardrobes. Air conditioning in the master bedroom, geysers in the bathrooms, LED and false ceiling lights, and fans are already installed for added convenience.A modular kitchen with cabinets, a cupboard, and a chimney provides a sleek and efficient cooking space. Piped gas provision is in place and will be available at a future date. The dining hall is furnished with a six-seater table and opens to a balcony overlooking the swimming pool and other amenities.The flat has three well-appointed western-style bathroomstwo attached and one common. The wash area includes a wash basin, and geysers are installed in all bathrooms. Verified flooring throughout the home adds to its polished appeal. With its well-ventilated ambiance and modern features, this home ensures a comfortable and stylish lifestyle.FacilitiesThe apartment comes with power backup, ensuring uninterrupted convenience. Residents can enjoy a range of amenities, including a clubhouse, gym, party hall, jogging track, childrens play area, swimming pool, supermarket, and a clinic within the clubhouse. Sports enthusiasts have access to a tennis court and a basketball court, while the landscaped garden offers a peaceful retreat. Covered basement parking provides secure vehicle storage, and CCTV cameras in common areas enhance safety and security.LocalityDelhi Public School is located right next to the society, ensuring excellent educational access. The airport is just a 30-minute drive away, with Lingampally and Begumpet railway stations nearby for easy connectivity. Public transportation is readily available, and a metro station is planned for the area, enhancing future commute options.
